calendar.description: House Public Utilities and Energy Hearing
Senate Judiciary, Law Enforcement, and Criminal Justice Hearing

general_provisions: This bill addresses private and public nuisances.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>renumbers and repeals statutes in Title 47, Nuisances;<hr><ltbullet>modifies definitions for public nuisance crimes;<hr><ltbullet>repeals and renumbers statutes related to a civil action for a public nuisance;<hr><ltbullet>renumbers statutory provisions in Title 78B, Chapter 6, Part 11, Nuisance, to Title 78B, Chapter 6a, Civil Actions for Nuisances;<hr><ltbullet>defines terms related to public and private nuisances;<hr><ltbullet>abrogates the common law right of action for a public or private nuisance;<hr><ltbullet>provides an exception for the attorney general with regard to the abrogation of the common law civil right of action for a public or private nuisance;<hr><ltbullet>creates a reporting requirement for the Judiciary Interim Committee regarding the exception for the attorney general to the abrogation of the common law civil right of action for a public or private nuisance;<hr><ltbullet> creates rights of action for a public nuisance;<hr><ltbullet>clarifies and amends the right of action for a private nuisance;<hr><ltbullet>addresses defenses for private and public nuisance actions; and<hr><ltbullet>makes technical and conforming changes.
